debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

failed_attempts:
have hx0 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], x ≠ 0 := fun x hx => ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
  rw [integral_add (continuousOn_inv₀ this).intervalIntegrable (continuousOn_zpow₀ (-2) fun x hx => .inl (hx0 x hx)).intervalIntegrable,
    integral_inv_of_pos ha hb, integral_one_div_pow (by norm_num) hx0]
  simp [zpow_neg_one]; ring

rw [integral_add (intervalIntegrable_one_div this) (intervalIntegrable_one_div_pow 2 this),
    integral_one_div this, integral_one_div_sq this, abs_of_pos ha, abs_of_pos hb]
  ring

rw [integral_add (intervalIntegrable_inv this) (intervalIntegrable_zpow (-2) (Or.inl this)),
    integral_one_div this, integral_zpow (-2) (by norm_num) this]
  simp [abs_of_pos ha, abs_of_pos hb]
  ring

rw [integral_deriv_eq_sub' (λ x => log x - 1 / x)]
  · intro x hx
    have hx₀ := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    convert (hasDerivAt_log hx₀).sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx₀) using 1
    simp [hx₀, pow_two]
  · refine (continuousOn_inv₀.mono ?_).add (continuousOn_inv₀.mono ?_).pow 2
    all_goals exact fun x hx => ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
  · ring

rw [integral_add (intervalIntegrable_1_div this) (intervalIntegrable_1_div_pow 2 this),
    integral_1_div this, integral_1_div_pow 2 (by norm_num) this]
  simp [abs_of_pos ha, abs_of_pos hb]
  ring

simp [integral_inv_eq_log_sub_log this, integral_one_div_sq this]
  ring

rw [integral_add (intervalIntegrable_inv this) (intervalIntegrable_one_div_pow this),
    integral_inv this, integral_one_div_sq this]
  ring

trans (log b - 1 / b) - (log a - 1 / a)
  · apply integral_deriv_eq_sub
    · intro x hx
      have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := fun h ↦ this (h ▸ hx)
      convert (has_deriv_at_log hx0).sub (has_deriv_at_inv hx0) using 1
      field_simp
    · refine (continuousOn_inv₀.add (continuousOn_inv₀.pow 2)).mono ?_
      intro x hx; exact fun h ↦ this (h ▸ hx)
  · ring

rw [integral_add (intervalIntegrable_inv this) (intervalIntegrable_one_div_pow 2 this),
    integral_inv_of_pos ha hb, integral_one_div_pow_of_ne_one (by decide) this]
  simp
  ring

have h : ∀ x ∈ uIcc a b, x ≠ 0 := fun x hx => ne_of_mem_uIcc_of_not_mem_uIcc hx this
  rw [integral_deriv_eq_sub' (fun x hx => ((hasDerivAt_log (h x hx)).sub (hasDerivAt_inv (h x hx))).congr_deriv (by simp [h x hx]))]
  · ring
  · exact (continuousOn_inv₀ h).add (continuousOn_inv₀ h |>.pow 2)

refine (integral_deriv_eq_sub (fun x hx => ?_) ?_).trans ?_
  · have hx₀ : x ≠ 0 := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    convert (hasDerivAt_log hx₀).add (hasDerivAt_inv hx₀).neg
    simp [hx₀]
  · exact (continuousOn_inv₀.add (continuousOn_inv₀.pow 2)).mono (fun x hx => ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this)

rw [integral_deriv_eq_sub (fun x hx ↦ by
    have hx₀ : x ≠ 0 := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this

  ring

rw [uIcc_of_le (min_le_max a b)]
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨h1, h2⟩
    have : 0 < min a b := lt_min ha hb
    exact (this.trans_le h1).false

  · intro x hx
    have hx0 : x ≠ 0 := subset_compl_singleton_iff.mpr this hx
    convert (hasDerivAt_log hx0).sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx0) using 1
    simp [hx0]

    · exact continuousOn_inv₀
    · exact continuousOn_zpow₀ (-2)
